description: Make /prds the single hub for PRDs and related stories, remove /blog from nav, and move the older-PRDs control into /prds.

userStories.title: Show related stories in PRD accordion
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to see related stories directly under each PRD when expanded so I can connect briefs to shipped work.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded PRD rows render a nested list of related stories (link to /blog/[slug])
Stories appear only when the PRD is expanded
Stories are ordered newest-first by story date
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Related stories render under expanded PRDs with newest-first ordering.

userStories.title: Remove /blog as a destination
userStories.description: As a reader, I want /prds to be the primary hub without a competing blog index.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary nav removes the Build notes link
/blog is removed from nav and not treated as a primary hub page
userStories.notes: Primary nav now omits the Build notes link.

userStories.title: Move Show older PRDs control to /prds
userStories.description: As a reader, I want older PRDs collapsed by default on the main hub to keep the page short.
acceptanceCriteria: /prds shows newest PRDs by default and a Show older PRDs control
Older PRDs expand only when the control is opened
Control is visually distinct and accessible
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added Show older PRDs control on /prds with distinct pill styling.

userStories.title: Hide empty story sections
userStories.description: As a reader, I don't want empty placeholders under PRDs with no related stories.
acceptanceCriteria: PRDs with zero related stories show no story section when expanded
userStories.notes: Zero-story PRDs render no story section.
